# Global Key Partners

> Global Key Partners GmbH (GKP) is a Swiss boutique access and introduction firm based in Cham, Zug. GKP connects UHNWIs, family offices, and private investors with curated off-market opportunities in Swiss real estate, hospitality, business acquisitions, and private markets. GKP acts exclusively as an introducer and business consultant; it is not a bank, asset manager, or financial adviser and is not supervised by FINMA.

Site languages: English (default), German (/de/), French (/fr/). Contact: https://globalkeypartners.com/contact/

## Services

- [Strategic Introductions & Capital Access](https://globalkeypartners.com/services/strategic-introductions/): GKP facilitates trusted introductions between UHNWIs, family offices, founders, and private investors in Switzerland, connecting private capital with the right people, deals, and capital partners.
- [Off-Market Real Estate & Business Acquisitions](https://globalkeypartners.com/services/off-market-sourcing/): Access off-market real estate and business acquisition opportunities across Switzerland. GKP connects qualified buyers with private property and owner-operated companies in Zurich, Geneva, Zug, Basel, and Lucerne, before public listing.
- [Strategic Partnerships: Luxury Brands & Hospitality](https://globalkeypartners.com/services/strategic-partnerships/): GKP connects luxury and premium brands with investors, strategic partners, and market access, and facilitates off-market hospitality investment opportunities, across Switzerland, Europe, the Gulf, and Southeast Asia.

## Insights

- [Buying Property in Switzerland as a Foreigner: What's Actually Possible](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/buying-property-in-switzerland-as-a-foreigner/): Thinking about buying property in Switzerland as a foreign investor? Here's what's realistically possible, what isn't, and how qualified buyers actually approach the Swiss market.
- [How to Access Off-Market Real Estate in Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/how-to-access-off-market-real-estate-switzerland/): A practical guide to off-market property in Switzerland, how the hidden market works, who controls deal flow, what sellers expect from buyers, and how qualified buyers gain access to premium assets before they are ever listed.
- [How Family Offices Source Private Deal Flow in Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/family-office-deal-flow-switzerland/): A guide to how Swiss and European family offices access off-market deal flow, the channels, intermediaries, and relationship structures that underpin private capital deployment in Switzerland.
- [Family Office Introduction in Switzerland: What It Is and How It Works](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/family-office-introductions-switzerland/): A practical guide to family office introduction in Switzerland, how it differs from fundraising, who the key capital holders are, and how founders and asset owners can access Swiss private capital.
- [Off-Market Business Acquisitions in Switzerland: The Buyer's Guide](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/off-market-business-acquisitions-switzerland/): The Swiss and DACH region is undergoing a succession wave with thousands of profitable SMEs changing hands. This guide explains how qualified buyers can access off-market acquisition opportunities before they are publicly listed.
- [Lex Koller Explained: What Asian Investors Need to Know Before Buying Swiss Real Estate](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/lex-koller-guide-asian-investors-swiss-real-estate/): A clear guide to Switzerland's Lex Koller law for Singapore, Hong Kong, Malaysian, and Thai investors, what it restricts, what it permits, and how qualified buyers navigate it.
- [How Singapore, Hong Kong, and Malaysian Family Offices Are Investing in Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/singapore-hong-kong-malaysia-family-offices-investing-switzerland/): An overview of how Asian family offices, particularly from Singapore, Hong Kong, and Malaysia, are approaching Swiss real estate, private markets, and business acquisitions in 2025 and beyond.
- [How Gulf and Middle East Investors Access Swiss Real Estate and European Private Markets](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/gulf-middle-east-investors-swiss-real-estate-europe/): A guide for UAE, Saudi, and Gulf family offices seeking off-market Swiss real estate and European private investment opportunities, how the market works and how GKP provides access.
- [Investing in Southeast Asia from Switzerland and Europe: What Private Investors Need to Know](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/investing-in-southeast-asia-from-switzerland-europe/): A practical guide for Swiss and European family offices, private investors, and capital funds considering investment in Southeast Asia, real estate, hospitality, private equity, and how to access the market.
- [How to Buy a Business in Switzerland as a Foreign Investor](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/how-to-buy-a-business-in-switzerland-as-foreign-investor/): A practical guide for foreign investors, family offices, and strategic buyers on acquiring Swiss businesses, succession situations, SMEs, and off-market M&A. What to know, what to expect, and how GKP helps.
- [Switzerland Lump-Sum Taxation: What UHNWI and Family Offices Need to Know](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/switzerland-lump-sum-taxation-uhnwi-family-offices/): A clear guide to Swiss lump-sum taxation (Pauschalbesteuerung) for ultra-high-net-worth individuals and family offices considering Swiss fiscal domicile, eligibility, cantons, costs, and how it compares globally.
- [Hospitality Investment in Switzerland: A Private Investor's Guide to Boutique Hotels and Alpine Resorts](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/hospitality-investment-switzerland/): A practical guide to hospitality investment in Switzerland, covering boutique hotel and alpine resort acquisitions, off-market access, structuring, Lex Koller considerations, and what qualified private investors should know.
- [Taiwan Family Offices Investing in Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/taiwan-family-offices-investing-in-switzerland/): A guide for Taiwanese family offices and UHNWI on investing in Switzerland: real estate, business acquisitions, Lex Koller, and how to access off-market opportunities.
- [Indian Family Offices and UHNWI Investing in Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/india-family-offices-investing-in-switzerland/): How Indian family offices and ultra-high-net-worth individuals can access Swiss real estate, business acquisitions, and off-market opportunities through GKP.
- [Saudi Arabia & Kuwait: Gulf Investors Accessing Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/saudi-arabia-kuwait-gulf-investors-switzerland/): How Saudi Arabian and Kuwaiti family offices and UHNWI can invest in Swiss real estate, business acquisitions, and off-market assets through GKP.
- [Indonesian Family Offices and Entrepreneurs Investing in Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/indonesia-investors-guide-switzerland/): A guide for Indonesian UHNWI, family offices, and business owners on accessing Swiss real estate, business acquisitions, and off-market opportunities.
- [Vietnamese Entrepreneurs and Family Offices: Investing in Switzerland](https://globalkeypartners.com/insights/vietnam-investors-guide-switzerland/): How Vietnamese UHNWI, entrepreneurs, and family offices can access Swiss real estate, business acquisitions, and off-market investment opportunities through GKP.
